title: Fresh diversified subaddress per payment request
description: Each PaymentAction::Address response must return a fresh diversified Sapling/Orchard receiver, not the default UA. Prevents address reuse which would allow correlation of payments. Increment diversifier index; persist last-used index in wallet DB.
close_reason: Done: Fresh diversified subaddress per payment request implemented via next_diversifier() in db.rs and dispatch_payment generates address per session. Diversifier persisted across restarts.
